name: Cucumber Rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cucumber in half horizontally.
2. Peel, seed and shred half of the cucumber.
3. Measure 1/3 cup shredded cucumber.
4. Slice remaining cucumber for garnish. Cut slices in half; set aside.
5. Combine cream cheese, mayonnaise and seasoned salt in a bowl. Mix until blended.
6. Stir in shredded cucumber.
7. Cut two 2-inch rounds from each bread slice.
8. Spread each round with 1 teaspoon of the cucumber spread.
9. Garnish each sandwich with a thin slice of cucumber and a sprig of parsley.
10. Makes 48 sandwiches.
